DevSeed.__comment: DEV ONLY. A fixed active test merchant so a signed /api/v1 request works out of the box. SigningSecret is a 64-hex (32-byte) HMAC key — client signs HMAC-SHA256(hexDecode(SigningSecret), "{X-Timestamp}\n{body}"). Override in a git-ignored appsettings.Local.json. Never a real merchant's secret (§10).
DevSeed.Name: Dev Test Merchant

KeyManagement.__comment: DEV ONLY. DevSecrets holds PUBLIC xpubs only — never a seed/mnemonic (§10). Default is the published abandon..about BIP-39 vector. To derive production addresses locally, override the xpub in a git-ignored appsettings.Local.json (same key), not here.
